category_description: Order reject codes: field presence, quantity, price, state-machine, and amend/replace lifecycle violations.

fixtures.title: Required field missing
fixtures.trigger_condition: A NewOrderSingle (35=D) arrives without the Side (54) field populated.

expected_reject.message: Required field missing: Side (54) is absent on NewOrderSingle CLIENT-001.

fixtures.remediation: Populate all required FIX fields (Side, OrderQty, Symbol, OrdType) before retransmitting the order.

fixtures.title: Missing limit price
fixtures.trigger_condition: A NewOrderSingle arrives with OrdType=2 (Limit) but the Price (44) field is absent.

expected_reject.message: OrdType=Limit requires Price (44); field is absent on order CLIENT-002.

fixtures.remediation: Set the Price (44) field on the limit order, or change OrdType to Market (1) if a limit price is not intended.

fixtures.title: Quantity zero or negative
fixtures.trigger_condition: A NewOrderSingle arrives with OrderQty set to 0.

expected_reject.message: OrderQty must be > 0; received 0 on order CLIENT-003.

fixtures.remediation: Set OrderQty to a positive integer representing the number of shares or contract units.

fixtures.title: Quantity exceeds max
fixtures.trigger_condition: An order with OrderQty=2,000,000 shares of AAPL exceeds the desk's notional cap of $50M (at $175/share, 285,714 shares max).

expected_reject.message: OrderQty 2,000,000 (notional $350,000,000) exceeds desk notional cap $50,000,000 on order CLIENT-004.

fixtures.remediation: Split the order into smaller child orders within the desk's notional cap, or request a cap increase via the permissions admin.

fixtures.title: Amend not allowed
fixtures.trigger_condition: A trader attempts to amend the quantity on an FX order that has already received a venue quote, locking the quantity for the two-step approval flow.

expected_reject.message: Cannot amend qty on order CLIENT-005: a venue quote (QT-FX-9921) is active; qty is locked pending two-step approval.

fixtures.remediation: Cancel the outstanding quote first, then resubmit the amendment, or complete the two-step approval on the existing quote.

fixtures.title: Quote expired
fixtures.trigger_condition: A trader submits an order referencing QuoteID QT-FX-9922 which expired 3 seconds ago.

expected_reject.message: QuoteID QT-FX-9922 expired at 14:30:00Z; order received at 14:30:03Z (3s late). Restage required.

fixtures.remediation: Request a new quote from the venue and resubmit the order within the quote's validity window.

fixtures.title: Order in terminal state
fixtures.trigger_condition: A cancel request arrives for order ORD-00789 which is already in the Filled terminal state.

expected_reject.message: Cannot cancel order ORD-00789: already in terminal state FILLED (cum_qty=10000, leaves_qty=0).

fixtures.remediation: No action required — the order has been fully filled. Reconcile the fills against the OMS blotter.

fixtures.title: Pending-amend in flight
fixtures.trigger_condition: A second OrderCancelReplaceRequest arrives for order ORD-00790 while the first replace is already in PendingReplace state at the venue.

expected_reject.message: Cannot accept second amend on ORD-00790: first amend (CLIENT-790-RPL1) is still in PendingReplace.

fixtures.remediation: Wait for the first amend to be acknowledged or rejected by the venue before sending a second replace request.
